info.title: Microsoft Defender for Cloud
info.description: API spec for Microsoft.Security (Microsoft Defender for Cloud) resource provider

get.description: Gets the list of all possible traffic between resources for the subscription
Gets a list of discovered Security Solutions for the subscription.
Gets a list of external security solutions for the subscription.
Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control.
Gets the list of all possible traffic between resources for the subscription and location.
Gets a list of discovered Security Solutions for the subscription and location.
Gets a list of external Security Solutions for the subscription and location.
Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control for the subscription, location
Gets list of all supported Security Solutions for subscription and location.
Gets a list that allows to build a topology view of a subscription and location.
Gets a list of Security Solutions for the subscription.
Gets a list of all supported Security Solutions for the subscription.
Gets a list that allows to build a topology view of a subscription.
Gets a list of server vulnerability assessment onboarding statuses on a given resource.
Gets a server vulnerability assessment onboarding statuses on a given resource.

put.description: Creating a server vulnerability assessment on a resource, which will onboard a resource for having a vulnerability assessment on it

delete.description: Removing server vulnerability assessment from a resource.

get.description: Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control for the subscription, location
Gets the list of all possible traffic between resources for the subscription and location, based on connection type.
Gets a specific discovered Security Solution.
Gets a specific external Security Solution.
Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control for the subscription, location
Policies for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control for the subscription, location

put.description: Create a policy for protecting resources using Just-in-Time access control

delete.description: Delete a Just-in-Time access control policy.

post.description: Initiate a JIT access from a specific Just-in-Time policy configuration.

get.description: Gets a specific Security Solution.
Gets a specific topology component.

AadConnectivityState.description: Describes an Azure resource with kind

connectivityState.title: The connectivity state of the external AAD solution

AadExternalSecuritySolution.description: Represents an AAD identity protection solution which sends logs to an OMS workspace.

AadSolutionProperties.title: The external security solution properties for AAD solutions

AllowedConnectionsResource.description: The resource whose properties describes the allowed traffic between Azure resources

AllowedConnectionsResourceProperties.description: Describes the allowed traffic between Azure resources

calculatedDateTime.description: The UTC time on which the allowed connections resource was calculated

AtaExternalSecuritySolution.description: Represents an ATA security solution which sends logs to an OMS workspace

AtaSolutionProperties.title: The external security solution properties for ATA solutions

CefExternalSecuritySolution.description: Represents a security solution which sends CEF logs to an OMS workspace

CefSolutionProperties.title: The external security solution properties for CEF solutions

ConnectableResource.description: Describes the allowed inbound and outbound traffic of an Azure resource

inboundConnectedResources.description: The list of Azure resources that the resource has inbound allowed connection from

outboundConnectedResources.description: The list of Azure resources that the resource has outbound allowed connection to

ConnectedResource.description: Describes properties of a connected resource

connectedResourceId.description: The Azure resource id of the connected resource

ConnectedWorkspace.title: Represents an OMS workspace to which the solution is connected

id.description: Azure resource ID of the connected OMS workspace

securityFamily.description: The security family of the discovered solution

ExternalSecuritySolution.description: Represents a security solution external to Microsoft Defender for Cloud which sends information to an OMS workspace and whose data is displayed by Microsoft Defender for Cloud.

ExternalSecuritySolutionKind.description: Describes an Azure resource with kind

kind.description: The kind of the external solution

ExternalSecuritySolutionProperties.description: The solution properties (correspond to the solution kind)

allowedSourceAddressPrefix.description: Source of the allowed traffic. If omitted, the request will be for the source IP address of the initiate request.

endTimeUtc.description: The time to close the request in UTC

virtualMachines.description: A list of virtual machines & ports to open access for

justification.description: The justification for making the initiate request

id.description: Resource ID of the virtual machine that is linked to this policy

ports.description: The ports to open for the resource with the `id`

provisioningState.description: Gets the provisioning state of the Just-in-Time policy.

id.description: Resource ID of the virtual machine that is linked to this policy

ports.description: Port configurations for the virtual machine

publicIpAddress.description: Public IP address of the Azure Firewall that is linked to this policy, if applicable

allowedSourceAddressPrefix.description: Mutually exclusive with the "allowedSourceAddressPrefixes" parameter. Should be an IP address or CIDR, for example "192.168.0.3" or "192.168.0.0/16".

items.description: IP address or CIDR, for example "192.168.0.3" or "192.168.0.0/16".

maxRequestAccessDuration.description: Maximum duration requests can be made for. In ISO 8601 duration format. Minimum 5 minutes, maximum 1 day

startTimeUtc.description: The start time of the request in UTC

requestor.description: The identity of the person who made the request

justification.description: The justification for making the initiate request

allowedSourceAddressPrefix.description: Mutually exclusive with the "allowedSourceAddressPrefixes" parameter. Should be an IP address or CIDR, for example "192.168.0.3" or "192.168.0.0/16".

items.description: IP address or CIDR, for example "192.168.0.3" or "192.168.0.0/16".

endTimeUtc.description: The date & time at which the request ends in UTC

statusReason.description: A description of why the `status` has its value

mappedPort.description: The port which is mapped to this port's `number` in the Azure Firewall, if applicable

id.description: Resource ID of the virtual machine that is linked to this policy

ports.description: The ports that were opened for the virtual machine

securityFamily.description: The security family of the security solution

ServerVulnerabilityAssessment.description: Describes the server vulnerability assessment details on a resource

provisioningState.description: The provisioningState of the vulnerability assessment capability on the VM

calculatedDateTime.description: The UTC time on which the topology was calculated

topologyResources.description: Azure resources which are part of this topology resource

severity.description: The security severity of the resource

recommendationsExist.description: Indicates if the resource has security recommendations

networkZones.description: Indicates the resource connectivity level to the Internet (InternetFacing, Internal ,etc.)

topologyScore.description: Score of the resource based on its security severity

parents.description: Azure resources connected to this resource which are in higher level in the topology view

children.description: Azure resources connected to this resource which are in lower level in the topology view

resourceId.description: Azure resource id which serves as child resource in topology view
Azure resource id which serves as parent resource in topology view

securityFamily.description: The security family of the security solution

packageInfoUrl.description: The security solutions' package info url

publisherDisplayName.description: The security solutions' publisher display name
